name: 4thewild
description: Silent Place Finder – find the quietest spots near you

scripts.prepare:android: rm -rf android/app/src/main/assets/www && mkdir -p android/app/src/main/assets/www && cp index.html app.js style.css manifest.json android/app/src/main/assets/www/ && cp -r lib icons android/app/src/main/assets/www/
scripts.build:android: npm run prepare:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
